navigation.notes:
39 volumes available via sidebar links (li.aside__list-item > a.aside__list-item__link). Each volume page has sections: div.volume__articles and div.volume__notes, each containing a
    with
  • items. Each
  • contains an Title followed by ' - Author Name' text. PDFs are direct links on the volume page. Volume/issue info is in the h2 heading (e.g. 'Volume 39, Number 1: Fall 2025'). Section types (Articles, Notes, Forum) are in h3 headings.

selectors.selector: div.volume__articles ul li, div.volume__notes ul li
